summary: Iteration 37: Tested time block validation feature for program settings. All 6 features tested and verified working correctly. Validation dialog appears with overlap warnings, cleanup time warnings, and provides 'Upravit nastavení' (go back) and 'Beru na vědomí' (save anyway) buttons.
critical_code_review_comments: FEATURE VERIFIED: Validation dialog appears when saving program with overlapping time blocks
FEATURE VERIFIED: Validation dialog shows specific overlap warnings with times (e.g., 'Blok 08:00 (končí 09:30) se překrývá s blokem 09:00')
FEATURE VERIFIED: Validation dialog shows cleanup time warnings when gap < cleanup_time (e.g., '15 min gap but 30 min cleanup')
FEATURE VERIFIED: 'Beru na vědomí' button saves despite warnings - toast shows 'Program byl úspěšně aktualizován'
FEATURE VERIFIED: 'Upravit nastavení' button returns to settings tab for user to fix issues
FEATURE VERIFIED: No warning shown when time blocks don't overlap (e.g., 08:00 and 11:00 for 90min program)
Login flow works with httpOnly cookies
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing Historická prohlídka program (90min duration)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Time block validation feature fully implemented and working. validateTimeBlocks() function in ProgramsPage.js (lines 254-311) checks for overlaps and cleanup time conflicts. Validation dialog (lines 1894-1953) shows warnings with 'Upravit nastavení' and 'Beru na vědomí' buttons.

verified_features.feature: Validation dialog appears when saving program with overlapping time blocks
verified_features.test_case: Set time blocks to 08:00, 09:00, 10:00 for 90min program - dialog appeared with 2 overlap warnings

verified_features.feature: Validation dialog shows specific overlap warnings with times
verified_features.test_case: Warning text: 'Blok 08:00 (končí 09:30) se překrývá s blokem 09:00 (začíná 09:00). Při plné kapacitě by si rezervace vzájemně ubíraly místo.'

verified_features.feature: Validation dialog shows cleanup time warnings when gap < cleanup_time
verified_features.test_case: Set blocks 08:00-09:30 and 09:45-11:15 with 30min cleanup - warning: 'Mezi bloky 08:00 a 09:45 je mezera jen 15 min, ale úklid trvá 30 min'

verified_features.feature: 'Beru na vědomí' button saves despite warnings
verified_features.test_case: Clicked button, dialog closed, toast showed 'Program byl úspěšně aktualizován'

verified_features.feature: 'Upravit nastavení' button returns to settings tab
verified_features.test_case: Clicked button, dialog closed, settings tab content visible with time blocks section

verified_features.feature: No warning shown when time blocks don't overlap
verified_features.test_case: Set blocks 08:00 and 11:00 for 90min program - saved directly without validation dialog
Login with demo@budezivo.cz / Demo2026! - redirected to /admin

verified_features.feature: Programs page loads and displays programs
verified_features.test_case: Found 6 program cards on programs page

validation_logic_details.overlap_detection: Checks if current.end > next.start for consecutive time blocks
validation_logic_details.cleanup_warning: Checks if current.end + cleanupTime > next.start when blocks don't overlap
